name: jk_ff
description: JK flip-flop (type 14): J=link0, clk=link1, K=link2, Q=link3, Qbar=link4. Exercises set (J=1,K=0), toggle (J=1,K=1) and reset (J=0,K=1) across four rising edges. At tick 9 the clock AND K rise in the same tick, so the FF is enqueued twice — its self-referential toggle must fire exactly once (edge_prev idempotency) to match the C++ double-compute oracle.
